response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities, though limited explicit use of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java raises minor concerns.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in experience
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage despite required proficiency
German language skill is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based team
